title: Red wine sauce
excerpt: Ingredients 1 onion, finely chopped 30 ml olive oil 4 sprigs thyme 4 garlic cloves, bruised 1 bottle good red wine 250 ml stock 1 sprig rosemary Salt and pepper to taste 100 ml butter, cut into cubes Method Fry the onions in the olive oil until glassy. html:
Ingredients

  • 1 onion, finely chopped
  • 30 ml olive oil
  • 4 sprigs thyme
  • 4 garlic cloves, bruised
  • 1 bottle good red wine
  • 250 ml stock
  • 1 sprig rosemary
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 100 ml butter, cut into cubes

Method

Fry the onions in the olive oil until glassy. Add the rest of the ingredients (except the butter) and let it reduce quickly until you have about 250 ml left.

Remove the herb sprigs and stir in the butter, cube by cube, until it's incorporated and the sauce has a nice shine.

Easy!
